mapper.sql: rti.re_id as rri_id, rti.title_level, rti.title_name, rti.evaluation_time, rti.new_title_flag, rti.attribute1, rti.attribute2, rti.attribute3, rti.enabled_flag, rti.id, rti.update_time, rti.create_time, rti.update_by, rti.create_by

${tAlias}.re_id as ${tAlias}_rri_id, ${tAlias}.title_level as ${tAlias}_title_level, ${tAlias}.title_name as ${tAlias}_title_name, ${tAlias}.evaluation_time as ${tAlias}_evaluation_time, ${tAlias}.new_title_flag as ${tAlias}_new_title_flag, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by
mapper.insert: insert into re_title_interface (re_id, title_level, title_name, evaluation_time, new_title_flag, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag, update_time, create_time, update_by, create_by) values (#{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update re_title_interface set re_id = #{recruitmentInterface.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title_level = #{titleLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, title_name = #{titleName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, evaluation_time = #{evaluationTime,jdbcType=DATE}, new_title_flag = #{newTitleFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
